svg.text: Static typing for frontend and backend
Build tool with HMR and optimized bundles
The database consists of 6 tables implemented using Drizzle ORM schema definitions. Key design
rating columns use PostgreSQL real type (not integer) to support 0.5-step precision (e.g., 3.5,
feedback.custom_answers uses JSONB to store arbitrary question-answer pairs from HOD's form
form_templates.fields uses JSONB to store the HOD-configured custom question list per department.
feedback_windows.department_id is nullable — NULL means a global window applied to all
All FK relationships enforce referential integrity at the database level via Drizzle FK
faculty_id is nullable in both courses and feedback tables to support 'Faculty TBA' assignments.
The backend follows RESTful API design principles. All routes are prefixed with /api/. Input validation
uses Zod schemas at the route handler level before any business logic executes.
Submit anonymous feedback, return Ref ID
List all feedback windows with status
Add a new course with faculty assignment
CUPGS Academic Feedback Manager | Software Engineering Project Report
